runs.text: Introducing Prism 3.0 — the platform that sees, hears, reads, and understands. Built for the next decade of human-computer interaction.

texts.text: Introducing Prism 3.0 — the platform that sees, hears, reads, and understands. Built for the next decade of human-computer interaction.

runs.text: Real-time image, video, and document analysis. From handwritten notes to satellite imagery — Prism sees what humans see, and extracts meaning instantly.
